title: <div><tt>| ARTIST ID    | A persona, voice, or filter you take on to create, exp
content:
| ARTIST ID | A persona, voice, or filter you take on to create, explore, or express ideas. Think of it as a generator node. | `::4_bl00m`, `::ETCETER4` |
| PROJECT | A modular, evolving system created by or through one or more artist IDs. Has medium, timeline, and output mode. | `::MET4morfoses`, `::Q_v33R`, `::FLOAT1NG.P01NTS` |

- You, as `::4_bl00m`, spawn all artist IDs and projects.
- Each ARTIST ID = lens / voice / recursive filter
- Each PROJECT = tool / system / creative body

---

### II. | CLASS: Dream vs Reality Logic

**Filter classification system for narrative tone + structural logic.**
